questions.question: What was the first rule of Fight Club?
questions.answer: You do not talk about Fight Club.

questions.question: What type of scooter did every kid need to own?
Name the title and artist of the song that begins with, "Oh baby, baby, how was I supposed to know that something wasn't right here?"
questions.answer: "Baby One More Time" by Britney Spears

questions.question: After 9/11, what name was given to define a war that was not against one particular country?
What did it mean to "throw shade"?
questions.answer: A sneaky way of putting someone down or criticizing them.
